ns0:entry.ns0:title: DataExpert-io/data-engineer-handbook
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DataExpert-io/data-engineer-handbook
Language: jupyter-notebook
This is a repo with links to everything you'd ever want to learn about data engineering

ns0:entry.ns0:title: GoogleCloudPlatform/generative-ai
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/GoogleCloudPlatform/generative-ai
Language: jupyter-notebook
Sample code and notebooks for Generative AI on Google Cloud, with Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform

ns0:entry.ns0:title: GoogleCloudPlatform/python-docs-samples
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/GoogleCloudPlatform/python-docs-samples
Language: jupyter-notebook
Code samples used on cloud.google.com

ns0:entry.ns0:title: GoogleCloudPlatform/vertex-ai-samples
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/GoogleCloudPlatform/vertex-ai-samples
Language: jupyter-notebook
Notebooks, code samples, sample apps, and other resources that demonstrate how to use, develop and manage machine learning and generative AI workflows using Google Cloud Vertex AI.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: IDEA-Research/Grounded-SAM-2
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/IDEA-Research/Grounded-SAM-2
Language: jupyter-notebook
Grounded SAM 2: Ground and Track Anything in Videos with Grounding DINO, Florence-2 and SAM 2

ns0:entry.ns0:title: QwenLM/Qwen3-VL
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QwenLM/Qwen3-VL
Language: jupyter-notebook
Qwen3-VL is the multimodal large language model series developed by Qwen team, Alibaba Cloud.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: UFund-Me/Qbot
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/UFund-Me/Qbot
Language: jupyter-notebook
[🔥updating ...] AI 自动量化交易机器人(完全本地部署) AI-powered Quantitative Investment Research Platform. 📃 online docs: https://ufund-me.github.io/Qbot ✨ :news: qbot-mini: https://github.com/Charmve/iQuant

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aws/amazon-sagemaker-examples
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aws/amazon-sagemaker-examples
Language: jupyter-notebook
Example 📓 Jupyter notebooks that demonstrate how to build, train, and deploy machine learning models using 🧠 Amazon SageMaker.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: datawhalechina/happy-llm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/datawhalechina/happy-llm
Language: jupyter-notebook
📚 从零开始构建大模型

ns0:entry.ns0:title: datawhalechina/llm-universe
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/datawhalechina/llm-universe
Language: jupyter-notebook
本项目是一个面向小白开发者的大模型应用开发教程，在线阅读地址：https://datawhalechina.github.io/llm-universe/

ns0:entry.ns0:title: datawhalechina/self-llm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/datawhalechina/self-llm
Language: jupyter-notebook
《开源大模型食用指南》针对中国宝宝量身打造的基于Linux环境快速微调（全参数/Lora）、部署国内外开源大模型（LLM）/多模态大模型（MLLM）教程

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dusty-nv/jetson-containers
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dusty-nv/jetson-containers
Language: jupyter-notebook
Machine Learning Containers for NVIDIA Jetson and JetPack-L4T

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebookresearch/dinov3
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebookresearch/dinov3
Language: jupyter-notebook
Reference PyTorch implementation and models for DINOv3

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebookresearch/segment-anything
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebookresearch/segment-anything
Language: jupyter-notebook
The repository provides code for running inference with the SegmentAnything Model (SAM), links for downloading the trained model checkpoints, and example notebooks that show how to use the model.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: greyhatguy007/Machine-Learning-Specialization-Coursera
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/greyhatguy007/Machine-Learning-Specialization-Coursera
Language: jupyter-notebook
Contains Solutions and Notes for the Machine Learning Specialization By Stanford University and Deeplearning.ai - Coursera (2022) by Prof. Andrew NG

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openai/CLIP
ns0:entry.ns0:content:

CLIP (Contrastive Language-Image Pretraining), Predict the most relevant text snippet given an image
